title: JUL-232 I Was On My Way To Work, And This Female Associate Who Worked For My Client Came At Me And Made Me Cum, Over And Over Again Akari Neo
description: Koichi, who felt vacant every day when he repeatedly went back and forth between the office and his house, received a reverse complaint from a woman while commuting to work one day. Excited by the stimulating pleasure that I have never tasted before, I can not stand it and I get spoiled. However, the other party was Akari, a female employee of a business partner. Koichi, who was seized with his weaknesses, had to accept the act of rebellion on the train as he was told. Koichi gradually becomes absorbed in the perverted extraordinary life with her who blames her with a smile.
